backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Service, ServiceCategory, Address) and backend logic including role-based access control, user approval, and CRUD operations for a home service marketplace on ICP.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs to their titles, associated source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking implementation evidence of customer-facing frontend features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries for four frontend files: useQueries.ts, BookingsManagement.tsx, ServicesManagement.tsx, and ReportsScreen.tsx, noting key fixes applied to each.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Urban Company Clone - Home Service Marketplace' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that determines app mode (customer/technician/admin) from the URL path and renders the appropriate app, managing customer navigation state, booking flow, and authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard component displaying KPI cards (bookings, revenue, active technicians), a weekly revenue bar chart, and a recent bookings table with color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Admin panel sidebar component with navigation links for all admin sections (dashboard, users, technicians, bookings, services, offers, reports) and a logout button that clears Internet Identity and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingsMa: Admin component for viewing and managing bookings with filtering by status, date, and search. Supports assigning technicians and transitioning booking statuses through defined valid state transitions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsScr: Admin reports screen with tabbed views for revenue (daily/monthly bar charts and summary cards) and technician performance (sortable table). Uses mock data and Recharts for visualizations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin component for managing service categories and individual services, supporting create/edit/delete operations via React Query hooks with a modal form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/Technician: Admin component for managing technicians using mock data, allowing adding new technicians, approving documents, and toggling active/suspended status.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin component that lists users fetched via React Query, supports search by principal ID, pagination, and blocking/unblocking users by toggling their approval status.
frontend/src/components/customer/Account: Customer account screen displaying profile info (name, phone, email) and navigation menu items for addresses, notifications, security, and support, plus a sign-out button.
frontend/src/components/customer/AddAddr: A modal dialog component that renders a form for adding a new delivery address, including fields for label, phone, address lines, city, state, zip, and a default checkbox, with submission handled via the useSaveAddress mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/customer/Address: A screen component that lists saved addresses for selection during checkout, supports setting a default address, and includes an 'Add New Address' button that opens the AddAddressModal.
frontend/src/components/customer/AuthFlo: An authentication flow component that collects a phone number and OTP in two steps, then triggers Internet Identity login via the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/customer/Booking: A booking confirmation screen that displays a summary of cart items, address, date/time, and payment method selection; after confirmation it shows a success state with the booking ID and copy functionality.
A step component in the booking flow that provides a textarea for the customer to enter special instructions for the technician, with a character counter and a continue button.

A view that displays a filterable list of mock bookings with status badges and supports drilling into a booking detail view; uses hardcoded mock data with statuses like Pending, Assigned, Completed, etc.
frontend/src/components/customer/BottomN: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar for the customer app with four tabs: Home, Bookings, Rewards, and Account. Highlights the active tab with a primary color style.
frontend/src/components/customer/CartSum: Displays the customer's cart with item details, quantity controls, and remove options. Shows a total and a proceed button, or an empty state if the cart has no items.
frontend/src/components/customer/DateTim: Provides a UI for selecting a booking date from the next 7 days and a time slot from a fixed list. Calls back with the selected date and time, and allows navigation forward or back.
frontend/src/components/customer/HomeScr: Renders the customer home screen with an auto-advancing banner slider, searchable service categories, and featured services fetched from the backend. Supports category and service selection callbacks.
frontend/src/components/customer/Profile: Modal dialog that collects first name, last name, phone, and email to create a new user profile via the backend. Blocks dismissal until the form is submitted successfully.
frontend/src/components/customer/Rewards: Shows the customer's wallet balance, referral code with a copy button, referral stats, a how-it-works explainer, and a mock transaction history list.
frontend/src/components/customer/Service: React component that displays detailed information about a single service (image, price, duration, description, features) with loading/not-found states and an 'Add to Cart' button.
React component that lists all services within a given category, showing each as a card with image, rating, duration, price, and an add-to-cart action.
frontend/src/components/layouts/AdminLay: Layout wrapper for admin pages that renders the AdminSidebar alongside a scrollable main content area.
frontend/src/components/layouts/MobileCo: Layout wrapper that centers content in a mobile-width container with a minimum full-screen height, used to simulate a mobile app shell.
frontend/src/components/shared/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread-count badge and a dropdown list of app notifications with mark-as-read functionality, hidden when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingFlow.ts: Custom hook managing the full booking flow state (cart items, address, date/time slot, notes, payment method, confirmed booking ID) with derived cart totals and CRUD helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that wrap DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, identity, and login-status state for Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Provides a `useNotifications` hook that fetches mock notifications via React Query, polls every 30 seconds, and exposes mutations to mark individual or all notifications as read.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, addresses, service categories, and related CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Inter font, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for brand colors, dark mode, status colors, and utility classes like gradients and shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that guards access by checking authentication and admin role, then renders section-based admin components (dashboard, users, technicians, bookings, services, reports) within an `AdminLayout`.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicianApp.tsx: Technician-facing mobile app page with mock job data, allowing technicians to view assigned jobs, update job statuses, and manage extra billable items.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a full multi-panel home service marketplace app (Customer, Technician, Admin panels) built on Firebase, listing architectural notes, required images, and already-implemented features.
